title: lowfriction
description: I didn't like the amount of friction you had to deal with while flying.
body:
While I was working on Create: To The Skies, I was having a ton of fun messing with gliders and grappling hooks. But the damn air friction was slowing me down to a halt after a good few nanoseconds!

So I speedran shitcode% and made a mod that heavily lowers air resistance. You're welcome.
